title: 32Pcs Valentines Decorations Kits, 20Pcs 18Inch Red Heart Balloons Set with 12Pcs Heart Hanging Swirl Streamer, for Anniversary Party Valentines Balloons Decor
features: Valentines Decorations Kits: Package include 20pcs 18inch red heart foil balloons, 12pcs red heart hannging glitter red swirl ornaments, 1pcs 10m red balloon ribbon.

High Quality Materials - Our love heart balloons are made of high quality latex materials, safety, non-toxic, strong and durable, and reusable. Heart hanging strings are made of high-quality paper,reused many times, It can infuses your party with excitement and vitality.

Easy to Use: The heart foil can inflate with helium or air, you can pinch your finger to the position of the inflatable mouth to seal it automatically. It is recommended to inflate to 85%-90%, in case it is too large and explodes. you can thread a ribbon or tassel through the hole of the heart hanging string and hang it where you want.

Suitable for a Variety of Occasions - This red themed valentines decorations creates a perfect surprise for your Valentine's Day and leaves you with unforgettable memories. Red heart balloons are perfect for anniversaries, bridal showers, princess parties, and weddings. They are also very suitable for photo backgrounds, menu arrangements, etc., adding a romantic atmosphere to every special moment!

Kindly Tips: Due to the thermal expansion and contraction characteristics of aluminum foil balloons, please avoid filling them with more than 90% air or helium, and avoid prolonged exposure to sunlight, overheating, sharp objects, and excessive friction. Wishing you a happy Valentine's Day!
